texts.orig: All AICTE approved Institutions are empowered to nurture ecosystems for Skilling (through Vocational courses) via making effective use of existing infrastructure facilities and human resources.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Important Instructions
texts.text: Important Instructions

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. As per mandatory Disclosure of APH 2024-27(Annexure-18, page180) Institutions must disclose the following information submitted to Council at the Prominent location on its website.
texts.text: As per mandatory Disclosure of APH 2024-27(Annexure-18, page180) Institutions must disclose the following information submitted to Council at the Prominent location on its website.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: i. Department wise availability of Infrastructure along with approved courses and intake approved by the Council.
texts.text: Department wise availability of Infrastructure along with approved courses and intake approved by the Council.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ii. Faculty details: Department wise: Name& Designation of the faculty members/teaching staff along with their qualification, tenure of service in your organization, total experience, Institution should also disclose Student Faculty Ratio, Cadre Ratio.
texts.text: Faculty details: Department wise: Name& Designation of the faculty members/teaching staff along with their qualification, tenure of service in your organization, total experience, Institution should also disclose Student Faculty Ratio, Cadre Ratio.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: iii. Additionally Audited Financial Statements for last 3 Financial years.
texts.text: Additionally Audited Financial Statements for last 3 Financial years.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Reservation Policy of the Central Government (Including EWS) / Respective State Government/ UT as the case shall be applicable to all the Programmes. The concerned State Government/ UT Admission authority shall decide Modalities of Admission.
texts.text: Reservation Policy of the Central Government (Including EWS) / Respective State Government/ UT as the case shall be applicable to all the Programmes. The concerned State Government/ UT Admission authority shall decide Modalities of Admission.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. The Institution offering courses earlier in the Regular Shift, First Shift, Second Shift/Part Time are now amalgamated as total intake and shall have to fulfil all facilities such as Infrastructure, Faculty and other requirements as per the norms specified in the Approval Process Handbook 2024-25 to 2027 for the Total Approved Intake.
texts.text: The Institution offering courses earlier in the Regular Shift, First Shift, Second Shift/Part Time are now amalgamated as total intake and shall have to fulfil all facilities such as Infrastructure, Faculty and other requirements as per the norms specified in the Approval Process Handbook 2024-25 to 2027 for the Total Approved Intake.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4. In case of any differences in content in this Computer generated Extension of Approval Letter, the content/information as approved by the Executive Council / General Council as available on the record of AICTE shall be final and binding.
texts.text: In case of any differences in content in this Computer generated Extension of Approval Letter, the content/information as approved by the Executive Council / General Council as available on the record of AICTE shall be final and binding.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5. All AICTE institutions are highly encouraged to get NBA/NAAC accreditation. All eligible AICTE institutions are thoroughly encouraged to participate in NIRF ranking process.
texts.text: All AICTE institutions are highly encouraged to get NBA/NAAC accreditation. All eligible AICTE institutions are thoroughly encouraged to participate in NIRF ranking process.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 6. Deemed to be University: Institutions Deemed to be Universities (Running Technical Education Programmes), it is mandatory to have AICTE approval from the Academic Year 2018-19 in compliance of the Hon'ble Supreme Court Order dated 03-11-2017 passed in CA No.17869- 17870 /2017.
texts.text: Deemed to be University: Institutions Deemed to be Universities (Running Technical Education Programmes), it is mandatory to have AICTE approval from the Academic Year 2018-19 in compliance of the Hon'ble Supreme Court Order dated 03-11-2017 passed in CA No.17869- 17870 /2017.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 7. AICTE Approved Institutes are encouraged to utilize SWAYAM PLUS Courses up-to 40%
texts.text: AICTE Approved Institutes are encouraged to utilize SWAYAM PLUS Courses up-to 40%

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 8. Internship is mandatory for all admitted students.
texts.text: Internship is mandatory for all admitted students.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 9. AICTE Approved Institutes are encouraged to make efficient use of the flagship schemes like:
texts.text: AICTE Approved Institutes are encouraged to make efficient use of the flagship schemes like:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a. Parakh: Student Gap analysis portal bases services.
texts.text: Parakh: Student Gap analysis portal bases services.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b. Students Scholarship schemes like Pragati, Saksham, Swanath, ADF, etc.
texts.text: Students Scholarship schemes like Pragati, Saksham, Swanath, ADF, etc.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: c. Course in Indian Languages.
texts.text: Course in Indian Languages.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: d. ATAL FDPs: Faculty training for Emerging areas and cutting edge Technologies.
texts.text: ATAL FDPs: Faculty training for Emerging areas and cutting edge Technologies.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: e. Augmenting Utilization of Research Assets (AURA).
texts.text: Augmenting Utilization of Research Assets (AURA).

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: f. Smart India Hackathon: World's largest Open Innovation Platform.
texts.text: Smart India Hackathon: World's largest Open Innovation Platform.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Prof.Rajive Kumar Member Secretary, AICTE
texts.text: Prof.Rajive Kumar Member Secretary, AICTE
